records.exhibitionTitleEn: The Carved Memory of Modern China
records.exhibitionTitleCn: 中国现代记忆的木刻史诗
records.descriptionEn: A permanent digital exhibition introducing Gu Yuan’s major works and their role in modern Chinese visual culture.
records.descriptionCn: 介绍古元重要作品及其在中国现代视觉文化中意义的常设数字展览。

records.descriptionEn: A thematic exhibition focusing on Gu Yuan’s earliest wartime woodcuts created around 1939–1940.
records.descriptionCn: 聚焦1939至1940年前后古元早期战时木刻作品的专题展览。

records.descriptionEn: An exhibition exploring Gu Yuan’s Yan’an-period visual language and rural wartime experience.
records.descriptionCn: 探索古元延安时期视觉语言与乡村战争经验的研究型展览。

records.descriptionEn: A study exhibition examining Gu Yuan’s adaptation of folk art, New Year prints, and popular visual traditions.
records.descriptionCn: 研究古元如何吸收民间艺术、年画与大众视觉传统的专题展览。

records.descriptionEn: A poetic exhibition exploring Gu Yuan’s landscape works and later reflections on place and memory.
records.descriptionCn: 探索古元风景作品与晚年记忆表达的诗意展览。

records.descriptionEn: A digital archive exhibition presenting family photographs, memories, oral history, and intergenerational continuity connected to Gu Yuan’s legacy.
records.descriptionCn: 展示与古元艺术遗产相关的家族照片、口述历史与跨代文化延续的数字档案展览。

records.exhibitionTitleEn: Gu Yuan and Contemporary Print Culture
records.descriptionEn: An exhibition examining Gu Yuan’s influence on contemporary printmaking, visual culture, and younger generations of artists.
records.descriptionCn: 探讨古元对当代版画、视觉文化与年轻艺术家的影响。

records.descriptionEn: A presentation of the ongoing digital preservation, translation, archive organization, and international research efforts related to Gu Yuan’s legacy.
records.descriptionCn: 展示古元数字保存、翻译、档案整理与国际研究工作的数字项目展览。
